name: getStudyCodes
description: Get one or multiple study codes that can be used to generate study links

studyIdOrUuid.description: Either a numeric study ID or a study UUID

batchId.description: numeric ID of the batch to which the study codes should belong to. If not set the default batch is used.

comment.description: Some identifying description or name (only for type `PersonalSingle` or `PersonalMultiple`). Can be left empty.

amount.description: Number of study codes to be created (only for type `PersonalSingle` or `PersonalMultiple`).

success.description: True if the operation completed successfully.

message.description: A message that describes the result of the operation.

items.description: A study code. The URL path of a study link has the format '/publix/{studyCode}'. Add the protocol, the domain or IP, and possibly a base URL path to get the full URL.
